top_10.title: How SpaceX preempted a $2B fundraise with a $60B buyout offer (Cursor acquisition)
top_10.one_line_reason: Cursor at $2B ARR with a $60B acquisition option signals AI coding tools are now critical infrastructure worth more than most Fortune 500 companies.

top_10.title: Shopify's AI Phase Transition: 2026 Usage Explosion, Unlimited Opus-4.6 Token Budget — with Mikhail Parakhin, Shopify CTO
top_10.one_line_reason: Rare CTO-level data on real enterprise AI adoption including the Dec 2025 token usage explosion — exactly what founders need to benchmark their own AI bets.

top_10.title: SpaceX-Cursor $10B partnership analysis: $60B acquisition option, Cursor at $2B ARR, xAI compute context
top_10.one_line_reason: Tom Tunguz breaks down why the deal makes strategic sense — the $2B ARR figure alone reframes what AI dev tools are worth.

top_10.title: Introducing workspace agents in ChatGPT
top_10.one_line_reason: Codex-powered cloud agents that automate complex workflows inside ChatGPT directly compete with Notion, Zapier, and enterprise automation platforms — builders need to know this exists today.

top_10.title: Qwen3.6-27B: Flagship-Level Coding in a 27B Dense Model
top_10.one_line_reason: A 27B open-weight model claiming flagship coding performance means teams can run powerful coding agents locally or cheaply — massive cost and privacy implications for builders.

top_10.title: Speeding up agentic workflows with WebSockets in the Responses API
top_10.one_line_reason: Concrete engineering deep-dive on reducing API overhead in agent loops — immediately actionable for anyone building production agentic systems on OpenAI.

top_10.title: Google makes an interesting choice with its new agent-building tool for enterprises (Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform)
top_10.one_line_reason: Google targeting IT/technical users rather than business users for enterprise agent building is a strategic signal that shapes where the enterprise AI tooling market is heading.

top_10.title: Exclusive: Google deepens Thinking Machines Lab ties with new multibillion-dollar deal
top_10.one_line_reason: Mira Murati's post-OpenAI lab landing a multibillion-dollar Google Cloud deal confirms the top AI talent exodus is building real competing infrastructure — watch this space.

top_10.title: LLMs enabling pro se lawsuits at unprecedented rates — systems regulated by human effort are breaking
top_10.one_line_reason: Ethan Mollick's observation that AI is breaking systems implicitly regulated by human effort cost is a critical strategic lens for founders building in regulated or high-friction industries.

top_10.title: OpenAI NOT deprecating text-embedding-3-small — announcement was a mistake
top_10.one_line_reason: Critical correction for any team with stored vectors — plus Simon Willison's warning about proprietary embedding lock-in is practical advice every builder should hear before committing to a vendor.
